articles.title: This tariff-refund portal is about to be America's hottest website - NPR
articles.description: Exactly two months after the Supreme Court struck down most of President Trump's tariffs, the U.S. government has set Monday as the day when some companies can begin requesting refunds.
articles.content:
After weeks of waiting to hear how or whether the U.S. government might refund the tariffs struck down by the Supreme Court, Monday is the day it finally begins. 
Imagine tens of thousands of busine… [+4012 chars]
